commands.review_summary:
The PR adds Signal native exec/plugin approval delivery, thumbs-up/thumbs-down reaction resolution, exact persistent reaction bindings, route re-checking, runtime context wiring, and focused tests.

PR surface: Source +1652, Tests +795. Total +2447 across 12 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. This PR adds a new Signal approval-reaction feature rather than fixing a reproducible existing bug. The PR body and diff provide source/test evidence, but not a current-main bug reproduction.
